title: selaginastrum rigidum
intro: Selaginastrum rigidum, also known as the Rigid Milkwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The Rigid Milkwort has been reported to have various health benefits, such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which is said to be an effective way to harness its medicinal properties.
